business_question: Which facilities have shown the largest improvement in reimbursement rates year over year?
business_context: Executives want to identify facilities with improving reimbursement performance and replicate successful operational practices.

aggregation_logic.YoY Growth: Current Year Rate - Previous Year Rate

sql_answer:
WITH yearly_rates AS (
    SELECT
        facility_id,
        YEAR(submitted_date) AS claim_year,
        SUM(approved_amount) /
        NULLIF(SUM(claim_amount),0) AS reimbursement_rate
    FROM fact_claims
    GROUP BY facility_id,
             YEAR(submitted_date)
)

SELECT
    facility_id,
    claim_year,
    ROUND(reimbursement_rate * 100,2) AS reimbursement_rate_pct,
    ROUND(
        (
            reimbursement_rate -
            LAG(reimbursement_rate)
            OVER(
                PARTITION BY facility_id
                ORDER BY claim_year
            )
        ) * 100,
        2
    ) AS yoy_growth_pct
FROM yearly_rates
QUALIFY yoy_growth_pct IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY yoy_growth_pct DESC;
